FAQ.question: What services do you offer?
FAQ.answer: I design and develop modern websites and mobile interfaces, focusing on clean UI, smooth user experience, and responsive frontend development.

FAQ.question: How much do your services cost?
FAQ.answer: My pricing ranges from $10 to $3000 depending on project size, complexity, and estimated delivery timeline.

FAQ.question: Do you build full websites or only design?
FAQ.answer: I can both design interfaces and develop frontend websites, depending on what the project requires.

FAQ.question: How long does a project take?
FAQ.answer: Delivery time depends on the scope of the project, but most projects typically take anywhere from a few days to a few weeks.

FAQ.question: What tools do you use for your work?
FAQ.answer: I mainly use Figma for design and React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for frontend development.

FAQ.question: Can you redesign an existing website?
FAQ.answer: Yes, I can improve or completely redesign existing websites to make them more modern, responsive, and user-friendly.

FAQ.question: Do you work with clients internationally?
FAQ.answer: Yes, I work with clients from different countries and communicate remotely throughout the entire project process.

FAQ.question: What do you need to start a project?
FAQ.answer: I usually need a clear idea of the project, any references or inspirations, and your required features or goals.

FAQ.question: Can you maintain or update my website?
FAQ.answer: Yes, I can help with ongoing maintenance, updates, and improvements after the initial project is completed.

FAQ.question: How do we communicate during a project?
FAQ.answer: We can communicate through email, WhatsApp, or any preferred platform to ensure smooth updates and feedback.
